nodes.label: P2.0 — re-establish the wall + DECIDE (lost vs entangled)
nodes.rationale: Locked first run of Phase 2: reproduces the deep-SCFF wall on CIFAR-10-flat and runs the DECIDE fork (max-power probe vs random projection vs raw vs pure-GD), with a synth no-wall control.

nodes.label: P2.0 verdict: LOST (not entangled)
nodes.rationale: CIFAR-flat wall slope -0.018/layer (5/5 seeds negative); DECIDE: SCFF 0.294 ~= RAND 0.298 -> selectivity negative; dead-units 0.02->0.47; effective rank 39->11.
